title: The God’s Knights Move on Elbaf
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Zoro, Colon, Luffy as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WAAAH! It was so scary, Miss Gerd!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HEY!! It's shameful for a warrior to cry!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Back off, Luffy!! These kids were raised with nothing but love and kindness!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: C'mon!! is this universal brat behavior now?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a bit of a let down, usop...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, but it's not like a peaceful Elbaf is a bad thing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi sh

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THAT WAS SO COOL!! YOU'RE AN EMPEROR ALL RIGHT!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why do you have to pull these stunts and ditch school?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Shaddap! I hate weaklings like you!!

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
